listing.interview_style_summary: 1:1 structured behavioural interview focused on past actions; trained alumni or admissions; ~45–60 minutes; deep probing.
listing.unique_hook: All admits interview; emphasis on recent meaningful professional/community experiences; depth over breadth (per handoff report).
listing.interviewer_profile: Alumni subset or MBA Admissions team
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 timed video prompts · default 90s prep / 8 min answer · drawn from programme question bank

listing.interview_style_summary: 1:1 application-based interview tailored to your file; ~30 minutes.
listing.unique_hook: Post-Interview Reflection due within 24 hours (guidance often cited as ~300–450 words).
listing.interviewer_profile: MBA Admissions Board member who reviewed your application
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 5 prompts · file-aware and behavioural video answers first, then post-interview written reflection last · default 45s prep / 5 min answer unless a prompt sets its own timers

listing.interview_style_summary: Team-based discussion plus a short one-to-one with admissions; real TBD is in a group room.
listing.unique_hook: Practice follows the real sequence in spirit: team-discussion debrief prompts, then one-to-one style questions, then more behavioural practice—all solo on camera.
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 timed video prompts · order: TBD debrief → one-to-one → behavioural pool · no live group room

listing.interview_style_summary: 1:1 behavioural interview; virtual per official guidance in handoff.
listing.unique_hook: Often a short pre-interview written/slide task—practised here as a timed written outline, not file upload.
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 prompts · pre-interview written exercise first when included, then weighted behavioural video prompts · default 45s prep / ~4m15s answer unless overridden

listing.interview_style_summary: 1:1 conversational interview; time for your questions.
listing.unique_hook: Single required interview; student, alum, or staff weighted equally in evaluation.
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 timed video prompts · default 60s prep / 9 min answer · drawn from programme bank

listing.unique_hook: Interviewer has not read full application; restate goals and motivations clearly.
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 timed video prompts · default 45s prep / ~5m15s answer · drawn from programme bank

listing.interview_style_summary: Invitation-only; prerecorded video and/or live remote options.
listing.unique_hook: Defining Leadership Principles as cultural lens; dynamic interview options per official interview page (step4).
listing.interviewer_profile: Student or alum for live remote
listing.practice_mechanics: Six questions per session · one of seven rotating sets · default 45s prep / 3 min answer

listing.interview_style_summary: Short video prompts plus a longer blind-style interview in reality.
listing.unique_hook: This session starts with two short video-style prompts when possible, then live-style behavioural prompts.
listing.interviewer_profile: Second-year student, recent alum, or admissions committee member
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 prompts · two timed video-style first, then blind-style video answers · per-prompt timers when set

listing.interview_style_summary: Interview with alumni or senior admissions staff; regional; in-person or online.
listing.unique_hook: Opens with the short Kira-style video prompt when present; then weighted behavioural practice.
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 timed video prompts · Kira-style items use shorter timers when defined on the prompt

listing.interview_style_summary: Kira-style components plus alumni interviews in the real process.
listing.unique_hook: Structured opening: Kira-style timed video, typed written, and alumni-style prompts when present in the bank, then behavioural practice.
listing.practice_mechanics: Up to 6 prompts · fixed order for Kira video → written → alumni when those types exist, then shuffled behavioural · multi-day Kira window not simulated
